info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Oracle WebLogic RESTful Management Services API
Edit Session
Oracle WebLogic Server Start an edit session

items.docs: Acquires a lock on the domain configuration and starts an edit session. All subsequent configuration changes are made within this session until activated or cancelled.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Activate pending configuration changes

items.docs: Activates all pending configuration changes made in the current edit session and releases the edit lock. Changes are distributed to all running servers in the domain.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Cancel the current edit session

items.docs: Cancels all pending changes in the current edit session and releases the edit lock without activating any changes.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Undo all unactivated changes

items.docs: Reverts all pending configuration changes that have not yet been activated without releasing the edit lock.

info.name: Servers
Oracle WebLogic Server List all servers

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include in the response

params.name: excludeFields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to exclude from the response

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include (e.g., self, parent, canonical). Use 'none' to exclude all links.

params.name: excludeLinks
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to exclude

items.docs: Returns a collection of all server configurations in the domain.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Create a new server

params.name: saveChanges
params.description: When false, changes are saved to the edit session but not validated until explicitly saved or activated.

items.docs: Creates a new server configuration in the domain. Requires an active edit session.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Get server creation form with defaults

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include (e.g., self, parent, canonical). Use 'none' to exclude all links.

items.docs: Returns a pre-populated template with default values for creating a new server.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Get a specific server configuration

params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include in the response

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include (e.g., self, parent, canonical). Use 'none' to exclude all links.

params.name: expandedValues
params.description: When true, properties are returned as objects with set and value fields indicating whether the property has been explicitly set.
